intro: I am conducting AI-based PHM (Prognostics and Health Management) research in the field of mechanical engineering.

items.title: Kernel Density Estimation Ensemble-Based RUL Prediction
items.description: Combines physics-based polynomial wear modeling with transformer architecture to predict tool remaining useful life. Uses adaptive labeling and KDE-based ensemble of 10 models.

items.title: Latent Space Alignment Domain Adaptation (LSADA)
items.description: Addresses unsupervised domain adaptation by reducing local distribution discrepancies through sequential minority region alignment and pseudo-label generation.

items.title: Gradient Alignment Partial Domain Adaptation (GAPDA)
items.description: Partial domain adaptation with domain knowledge filter reflecting fault characteristics and gradient alignment module for statistical loss alignment.

items.title: Domain Adaptation for Rock Drill Fault Diagnosis
items.description: Combines domain adversarial neural networks with MMD minimization and data-cropping for variable-length measurements. 2nd place in PHM 2022 Data Challenge.

items.title: ARDiff: Adaptive Reverse-Step Diffusion Framework
items.description: Unsupervised vibration signal denoising under industrial noise using frequency attention, noise prediction, and variance scaling.

items.title: Battery Maximum Available Capacity Estimation
items.description: Partial charge matrix framework with state discriminator for MAC estimation, achieving 9.7% improvement using short-term charging data.

items.title: Deep Learning-Based Tacholess Speed Estimation
items.description: Domain-informed framework using Selective Multi-Order Frequency module and multi-harmonic loss for robust IAS estimation.

items.title: Spectrum-Guided GAN with Density-Directionality Sampling
items.description: Addresses GAN training instability through spectral loss and selective latent vector sampling for high-fidelity fault signal generation.

items.title: Domain Adaptation with Label-Aligned Sampling (DALAS)
items.description: Combines domain adversarial learning with label-aligned sampling and metric learning for imbalanced cross-domain fault diagnosis.

items.title: Frequency-Learning Generative Network (FLGN)
items.description: Decomposes frequency into deterministic and stochastic components, enabling generation of variable-length signals with learned frequency characteristics.

items.title: Deep Learning-Based Fault Detection for Injection Molding
items.description: Supervised learning with class-balancing loss and feature-similarity-based recipe optimization for molding processes.

items.title: Data Drift Management in Bearing Systems
items.description: Detecting data drift in bearing signals by generating feature map-based images using simulation signals and applying YOLO object detection for condition estimation.

items.title: Vision-based Motion Magnification
items.description: Diagnostic method using time-frequency filtering to amplify specific frequencies, enabling accurate fault detection through measurable displacement.

items.title: Manufacturing Foundation Models
items.description: Large-scale multimodal foundation model for time-series, image, and text data from diverse manufacturing processes. Joint effort by POSTECH, SNU, KAIST, and KETI.

items.title: AI for Data Drift Management in Rotating Machinery
items.description: Integrating physical knowledge-based drift detection, domain-informed AI algorithms, and adaptive retraining. Validated using pump testbed.

items.title: Purpose-Built Electric Vehicles (PBV)
items.description: Deep learning for road diagnostics including anomaly detection via video, pothole identification through edge processing, and point cloud for road severity.

items.title: Deep Learning Framework for Industrial Data
items.description: Automatic selection of optimal model and parameters using partial domain adaptation and self-supervised learning, validated with real industrial motor data.

items.title: AI-Driven Diagnosis of Aircraft Anomalies
items.description: PHM using Flight Data Recorder analysis with correlation matrix approach and autoencoder models for anomaly detection and engine degradation prediction.
